name: 中考作文 · 5 大失分黑洞（纠错专项）
desc: 把中考阅卷扣得最快的 5 个洞逐个堵上：时态滑坡 / 中式搭配 / 介词冠词漏字 / 主谓一致 / 句子粘连破碎。配对记口诀 + 句境纠错单选，答案唯一、每题带解析。改编自王老师《5 大失分黑洞》诊断书。进阶免费档。

m1: 叙事一不留神跳回现在时；开头过去就一过到底
直译成 Chinglish；say + 人 是错的，须 tell + 人
漏 to / the / for / in / at；小词最先被扣分
everyone / each / news 后面跟单数动词
多句无连词=粘连；从句独立成句=破碎
m3: 错！“告诉某人”用 tell sb
arrive in（小地点用 arrive at）
在雨中（不是 under the rain）
加连词 and / but / so 或句号断开

m4.q: I went to the shop yesterday. The line ___ huge and my friend ___ she loved it.
m4.why: 叙事过去要一致：was + said；一混现在时就是“时态滑坡”。

m4.q: The shop owner smiled and ___ us the soup was special.
m4.why: “告诉某人某事”= tell sb sth → told；say 不能直接接人(said us 错)，talk / speak 不接双宾。

m4.q: We arrived ___ Donggang ___ noon and waited ___ line ___ an hour.
m4.why: arrive in 大地点；at noon；in line；for + 时间段——四个小词一个都不能漏。

m4.q: Everyone in our family ___ the soup, and the news ___ surprising.
m4.why: everyone + 单数 likes；news 不可数 + 单数 is。

ops: It was hot and salty I ate so much I felt sleepy.
It was hot and salty, and I ate so much that I felt sleepy.
It was hot and salty. Because I ate so much.
It is hot and salty, I eat too much, I feel sleepy.
m4.why: B 用 and / so...that 串成因果且时态过去；A 粘连、C 破碎、D 逗号粘连 + 时态错。

m4.q: It got dark, so he ___ the light.
m4.why: 开灯 = turn on（open the light 是中式）。

m4.q: I felt sick, so I ___ some medicine after I ___ the soup.
m4.why: 吃药 = take medicine；喝汤 = have / drink（都不用 eat）。

m4.q: When I was a child, I ___ cartoons every evening.
m4.why: when I was a child 是过去锚点，全句锁定过去 → liked。

ops: My friend say she loves it.
The shop owner told us the soup was special.
m5.why: 只有 C 全对(tell sb + 过去时)；A say→said、B open→turned on、D like→likes。

ops: I waited in line for an hour.
m5.why: 只有 D 对(in line, for an hour)；A 漏 in / the、B have→has、C are→is。

m5.q: I went ___ the restaurant and stood ___ line.
m5.why: go to + 地点；stand / wait in line。

m5.q: 选出完整且正确的句子：
ops: The line was long, so we waited.
The line was long we waited.
The line was long, we waited.
m5.why: B 用连词 so 连接；A 从句破碎、C 无连词粘连、D 逗号粘连。

m5.q: My father ___ a small shop and my mother ___ a car to work.
m5.why: 开店 = run；开车 = drive（都不是 open）。

m5.q: Each of the students ___ a dream, and everybody ___ to succeed.
m5.why: each / everybody 后跟单数动词 → has; wants。

m5.q: Yesterday I ___ to the market, ___ many snacks and ___ some mango rice.
m5.why: 叙事全过去：went / saw / bought，时态一致。

m5.q: We waited ___ line ___ almost an hour ___ the rain.
m5.why: in line；for + 时间；in the rain（中式 under the rain 是错的）。
